{{/* Build navigation data once and store in page scratch for reuse */}} {{ $all := slice }} {{ range .Site.AllPages }} {{ if .File }} {{ $all = $all | append . }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ .Scratch.Set "nav_pages" $all }} {{ $tmp := newScratch }} {{ $tmp.Set "ordered" (slice) }} {{ define "nav_flatten" }} {{- $scratch := .scratch -}} {{- $currentDir := .currentDir -}} {{- $pages := .pages -}} {{- $subdirs := dict -}} {{- $currentPages := slice -}} {{- range $pages -}} {{- $relPath := strings.TrimPrefix $currentDir .File.Path -}} {{- $parts := split $relPath "/" -}} {{- if eq (len $parts) 1 -}} {{- if ne .File.BaseFileName "_index" -}} {{- $currentPages = $currentPages | append . -}} {{- end -}} {{- else -}} {{- $subdir := index $parts 0 -}} {{- $subdirs = merge $subdirs (dict $subdir (dict)) -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- $items := slice -}} {{- range $currentPages -}} {{- $items = $items | append (dict "type" "page" "weight" (.Params.weight | default 999) "page" .) -}} {{- end -}} {{- range $subdir, $_ := $subdirs -}} {{- $subdirPages := slice -}} {{- $subdirIndex := "" -}} {{- range $pages -}} {{- if hasPrefix .File.Path (printf "%s%s/" $currentDir $subdir) -}} {{- $subdirPages = $subdirPages | append . -}} {{- if eq .File.BaseFileName "_index" -}} {{- $subdirIndex = . -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- if gt (len $subdirPages) 0 -}} {{- $w := 999 -}} {{- if $subdirIndex -}} {{- $w = $subdirIndex.Params.weight | default 999 -}} {{- end -}} {{- $items = $items | append (dict "type" "directory" "weight" $w "name" $subdir "pages" $subdirPages) -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- range sort $items "weight" -}} {{- if eq .type "page" -}} {{- $scratch.Set "ordered" ($scratch.Get "ordered" | append .page) -}} {{- else -}} {{- template "nav_flatten" (dict "currentDir" (printf "%s%s/" $currentDir .name) "pages" .pages "scratch" $scratch) -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{ end }} {{ template "nav_flatten" (dict "currentDir" "" "pages" $all "scratch" $tmp) }} {{ .Scratch.Set "nav_ordered" ($tmp.Get "ordered") }}
